Bringing Light to Humanity

Moonlight Humanity Foundation provides education, clean water, and emergency relief to displaced and impoverished communities worldwide.

Our Purpose

We are a beacon of hope for the voiceless

Moonlight Humanity Foundation is dedicated to helping indigenous, displaced, and impoverished people around the world, regardless of race, color, religion, or disability. With an emphasis on assisting women and children, we provide access to sanitation, education, and emergency relief.

We have committed to support children to learn English, Math, and their local language by hiring one teacher per village to care and look after those orphans in their villages, camps, and countries.

15+Countries Served
50,000+Lives Impacted
200+Active Volunteers

Our Vision

To bring attention and care towards a society of the voiceless. Our vision is to help address the basic humanitarian needs of displaced indigenous people by providing access to clean water and an education. The name Moonlight Humanity reflects the intention of shedding a light of love and hope over these forgotten people.

Our Programs

Education · Water · Relief
Education

Education for Rohingya Children

Providing classroom spaces and learning materials for displaced children in refugee camps, ensuring access to basic education regardless of circumstance.

Water & Sanitation

Clean Water Initiative

Building sustainable water infrastructure in communities without access to safe drinking water, reducing waterborne diseases and improving health outcomes.

Humanitarian Aid

Emergency Relief

Delivering immediate aid including food, shelter, and medical supplies to communities affected by natural disasters and humanitarian crises.

Child Welfare

Orphan Support Program

Identifying and sponsoring orphans and the poorest children in villages, providing food, coaching, and educational support so they can become productive members of society.

Seasonal Relief

Winter Aid Distribution

Distributing blankets, warm clothing, and heating supplies to families in conflict zones and refugee camps during harsh winter months.

Community Development

Women's Empowerment

Creating safe spaces and vocational training programs for women in displaced communities, fostering independence and self-sufficiency.

Real Impact

Lives touched, communities transformed

Every donation creates ripples of change. See how your support reaches those who need it most.
